# libredash admin maintenance

Prune bounded operational history

## Usage

```sh
libredash admin maintenance [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--apply` | bool | `false` | delete rows instead of dry-run |
| `--archived-agent-days` | int | `180` | archived agent conversation retention in days; 0 disables archived conversation pruning |
| `--audit-days` | int | `365` | audit event retention in days; 0 disables audit pruning |
| `--auth-state-days` | int | `30` | expired or revoked auth state retention in days; 0 disables auth-state pruning |
| `--query-days` | int | `90` | query event retention in days; 0 disables query pruning |
